recommendations.title: Freaky
recommendations.overview: A mystical, ancient dagger causes a notorious serial killer to magically switch bodies with a 17-year-old girl.

recommendations.title: Happy Death Day
recommendations.overview: Caught in a bizarre and terrifying time warp, college student Tree finds herself repeatedly reliving the day of her murder, ultimately realizing that she must identify the killer and the reason for her death before her chances of survival run out.

recommendations.title: We Have a Ghost
recommendations.overview: After Kevin finds a ghost named Ernest haunting his new home, he becomes an overnight social media sensation. But when Kevin and Ernest go rogue to investigate the mystery of the latter's past, they become targets of the CIA.

recommendations.title: Scouts Guide to the Zombie Apocalypse

recommendations.title: Drop

recommendations.title: Happy Death Day 2U
recommendations.overview: Collegian Tree Gelbman wakes up in horror to learn that she's stuck in a parallel universe. Her boyfriend Carter is now with someone else, and her friends and fellow students seem to be completely different versions of themselves. When Tree discovers

recommendations.title: Life in a Year
recommendations.overview: A 17 year old finds out that his girlfriend is dying, so he sets out to give her an entire life, in the last year she has left.

recommendations.title: The Wretched
recommendations.overview: A rebellious teenage boy, struggling with his parents' imminent divorce, encounters a terrifying evil after his next-door neighbor becomes possessed by an ancient witch that feasts on children.

recommendations.title: Rest Stop: Don't Look Back

recommendations.title: Home Sweet Home: Rebirth
recommendations.overview: When a city is overrun with a demonically-possessed crowd, a cop must find the source of evil to save his family.
